name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project

# Story
<!-- who would this be benefit? -->
As a ...
<!-- What would you want to see implementes? -->
I want ...
<!-- Why, how would this improve your experience -->
So that ...
<!-- Add any additional context here (ex. screenshots) -->

# Acceptence Criteria
<!-- list of things you want the developper to keep in mind and check before closing the issue -->

# Urgency
Critical <!-- the project is compleatly unusable if this is not done -->
High <!-- really important, must be done asap -->
Medium <!-- important but can wait a week or 2 -->
Low <!-- Would be nice but it can wait -->
